nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner in task completion
nodes.grounding_span: Always collaborate through a task. It's important for me to feel like I actually did the task with help. I don't like letting AI completely do my work

nodes.label: AI as mental load reducer for planning
nodes.label_negative: AI as source of impractical or irrelevant suggestions
nodes.grounding_span: AI has made some good, detailed daily and weekly training plans for me that need minimal adjustment. Really helps take the mental load off

nodes.label: AI as administrative assistant for nuisance tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI as encroaching on core athletic performance
nodes.grounding_span: AI takes over the tasks I consider a nuisance and would usually be delegated to another person entirely

nodes.label: AI as visual/graphic design tool for sponsorship
nodes.label_negative: AI as inadequate for visual design tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I'd hope AI is able to create better visuals and graphic designs. Securing sponsorships is a major part of the work as an athlete

nodes.label: Personal ownership of reflective debrief reports
nodes.grounding_span: Some other work I prefer to do on my own are debrief reports from a training day or regatta. It's important to me that all these reports are my own thoughts

nodes.label: Personal agency and ownership of work
nodes.grounding_span: It's important for me to feel like I actually did the task with help

nodes.label: Mental efficiency and reduced cognitive load
nodes.grounding_span: Really helps take the mental load off so I can just focus on going out and training

nodes.label: Athletic performance focus
nodes.grounding_span: My role as an athlete is to perform on the water

nodes.label: Effective sponsorship acquisition
nodes.grounding_span: Securing sponsorships is a major part of the work as an athlete

nodes.label: Authentic self-reflection and learning
nodes.grounding_span: It's also an important part of the learning process for me to actually critically think about the day and process what happened

nodes.label: Preference for collaboration over delegation
nodes.grounding_span: Always collaborate through a task. It's important for me to feel like I actually did the task with help

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for planning
nodes.grounding_span: AI has made some good, detailed daily and weekly training plans for me that need minimal adjustment

nodes.label: Frustration with AI for visual design
nodes.grounding_span: The ai model spent over half an hour generating a sponsorship package and when it was finally done, all it outputted was a single PDF page of black and white text

nodes.label: Resistance to AI for reflective tasks
nodes.grounding_span: Some other work I prefer to do on my own are debrief reports from a training day or regatta

nodes.label: Iterative refinement through back-and-forth
nodes.grounding_span: I usually go back and forth. Sometimes the suggestions don't make any sense practically and I have to ask the model to adjust

nodes.label: Task boundary setting based on personal ownership
nodes.grounding_span: It's important to me that all these reports are my own thoughts. It's also an important part of the learning process
